steps: File overpayment claim with Goldman Sachs for USD 2,025.00 on GOOGL dividend (ISIN US02079K1079) citing incorrect 13.5% vs treaty rate 15.0%
Submit US-UK tax treaty documentation showing 15% withholding rate applies to UK resident holding US securities
Request Goldman Sachs provide detailed calculation breakdown for the 675,000 shares at 0.2 USD/share dividend
Follow up within 30 days if no response and escalate to Goldman Sachs dividend operations management
